description: PolicyCapability payloads that MUST be rejected at the policy boundary BEFORE any containment check or hashing.

vectors.name: manifest-permission-entry-rejected
vectors.reason: Manifest-shaped PermissionEntry must resolve to PolicyCapability before signing/hashing.

vectors.name: path-with-dot-dot-rejected
vectors.reason: '..' segments MUST be rejected outright; no rewriting.

vectors.name: wildcard-space-rejected
vectors.reason: space MUST be concrete; '*' is rejected.

vectors.name: unknown-action-rejected
vectors.reason: Action not in the v0 action set is rejected.

vectors.name: empty-actions-rejected
vectors.reason: After normalization, action set MUST be non-empty.

vectors.name: sql-ddl-rejected-not-in-registry
vectors.reason: sql/ddl is rejected by the node parser and is absent from the registry.

vectors.name: sql-execute-phantom-rejected
vectors.reason: No tinycloud.sql/execute URN dispatch: the node routes on the SqlRequest body kind (Execute/Query/Export) gated by sql/read|write|admin, not on a sql/execute ability. Absent from the registry.

vectors.name: duckdb-execute-phantom-rejected
vectors.reason: No tinycloud.duckdb/execute URN dispatch: the node routes on the DuckDbRequest body kind gated by duckdb/read|write|admin, not on a duckdb/execute ability. Absent from the registry.
